_comment: FakePlayerPlugin – Vercel deployment config. Serves wiki as primary UI; API endpoints restricted to plugin (Java HTTP clients). Browsers hitting /api/* are redirected to /wiki.
_comment_builds: Only the two serverless API functions need explicit builds. Static files (wiki.html, CSS, JS, icons) are served directly by Vercel without a build step.
_comment_routes: Route priority is top-down. API routes must come first so they are matched before the wiki catch-all.

routes._comment: Plugin API – update checker used by UpdateChecker.java
Plugin API – status / version info used by the plugin
SPA catch-all – all /wiki/* hash routes are handled client-side by wiki-script.js
Root redirect – send bare domain visitors straight to the wiki
Fallback – any unmatched path shows the wiki (handles 404 gracefully)

_comment_headers: CORS headers for API routes so the Java plugin can call them cross-origin. Explicit Content-Type for CSS/JS prevents MIME-type errors in strict browsers.
